parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ok: true, ignored: true, reason: $input.first().json.ignore_reason || 'ignored' } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.OLLAMA_MODEL || 'qwen3.5:cloud', stream: false, format: 'json', system: $('Run Operator Turn').first().json.draftSystemPrompt || '', prompt: $('Run Operator Turn').first().json.draftPrompt || '', images: $('Compose Operator Input').first().json.image_base64 ? [String($('Compose Operator Input').first().json.image_base64).split(',').pop()] : undefined, options: { temperature: 0.1, top_p: 0.9 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ actor_ref: $('Compose Operator Input').first().json.actor_ref, chat_id: $('Compose Operator Input').first().json.chat_id, chat_id_number: $('Compose Operator Input').first().json.chat_id_number, user_id: $('Compose Operator Input').first().json.user_id, user_message: $('Compose Operator Input').first().json.user_message, draft: $json }) }}
